atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Tailwind directive for injecting base, components, and utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind directive for inlining utility classes into a custom CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind directive for defining custom styles in a specific layer.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind directive for specifying a custom Tailwind config path.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Tailwind directive for wrapping rules in a configured breakpoint.
